title: eulophia liliacea
intro: Eulophia liliacea, also known as the Greenhood orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine and has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Eulophia liliacea include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and tubers are typically dried and made into teas or infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
